free_text: Comparison of polarization and analyzing power for
the 15N(p,n)15O Reaction
A 2.5 cm long gas cell was filled 98.9% pure 15N gas
to give a target thicknesses of 3.1-6.3 mg/cm2.
Absolute uncertainties.
Data received by email from R. Byrd, 24 March 1999.
No reply received from R. Byrd to author proof.
SD,VM
Polarization analyzed by elastic 4He scattering
to a pair of side NE102 plastic scintillators.
The gas mixtures used in hellium cell were 190-200 bar
of 92-94% helium, 8-6% xenon.
1 atm.
1.3 atm.
2. atm.
Polarization analyzed by elastic 4He scattering
to a pair of side NE102 plastic scintillators.
The gas mixtures used in hellium cell were 190-200 bar
of 92-94% helium, 8-6% xenon.
Beam polarization about 0.78.
Detectors placed at equal angles to left and
right of beam in the horizontal reaction plane.  Two
detector pais were used: 4He-recoil scintillators and
NE213 organic scintillators.
Corrected for finite geometry and double scattering.
